---
title: "Hiring for Research Coordinator position"
description: "Now taking applications for Research Coordinator position!"
author: "Tierel Hood-Nellum"
date: "2026-06-10"
image: mke_brain.png
editor: 
  mode: source
---

![](mke_brain.png){width=300 fig-align="left" fig-alt="AI-generated image of a brain in the Milwaukee sky"}

The [HaML Lab](https://hamllab.org) is now taking applications for the Research Coordinator position at the [University of Wisconsin-Milwaukee](https://uwm.edu/). See the [Getting involved](/positions.html) page for details!
